path.style: stroke: none; fill-rule: nonzero; fill: rgb(221, 0, 49); fill-opacity: 1; --darkreader-inline-stroke: none; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-dd0031, #ff315f);
stroke: none; fill-rule: nonzero; fill: rgb(195, 0, 47); fill-opacity: 1; --darkreader-inline-stroke: none; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-c3002f, #ff4371);
stroke: none; fill-rule: nonzero; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-opacity: 1; --darkreader-inline-stroke: none; --darkreader-inline-fill: var(--darkreader-text-ffffff, #e8e6e3);
